title: PipeShare.net SaaS landing + tenant storage alignment
description:
PipeShare is now a separate product from the Horizon Pipe dev base on pipeshare.live.

pipeshare.net is the public SaaS front door: brochure landing page, Business login (cPanel), and Customer login with subscription license check. Provisioned SaaS tenants store files under tenants/{slug}/ on Wasabi (Phase 1 storage alignment). pipeshare.live remains Mike's base build for development and testing.

Who is affected: New SaaS customers use pipeshare.net. OVH non-SaaS paths unchanged. Deploy backend + frontend + nginx activate script on OVH.
changeLog: PipeShare.net landing with Business and Customer login panels.
Customer login checks tenant Stripe subscription (Invalid license message).
SaaS Wasabi keys prefixed with tenants/{slug}/ for portal uploads.
nginx serves pipeshare.net landing (no redirect to .live).
